tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user registration, login, logout, and session checks

tags.name: Cars
tags.description: Endpoints for managing vehicles in the CRM

tags.name: Revenues
tags.description: Endpoints for logging and updating driver daily revenue data

tags.name: Drivers
tags.description: Endpoints for managing drivers and their remuneration settings

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Endpoints for generating financial reports and dashboard analytics

put.description: Modifies an existing daily revenue log.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a logged daily revenue entry.

post.description: Logs multiple daily revenue entries for drivers at once.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all drivers for the current tenant.

post.description: Registers a new driver and sets up their initial profile.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all cars for the current tenant.

post.description: Creates a new car profile associated with the current tenant.

401.description: Unauthorized - Access token missing or invalid

post.description: Registers a new tenant/company profile along with the first administrator user.
Clears the access and refresh token cookies from the browser.
Authenticates user credentials and sets HttpOnly accessToken and refreshToken cookies.

200.description: Successfully logged in and cookies set

get.description: Fetches details of a specific driver.

patch.description: Updates fields of an existing driver profile.

get.description: Fetches details of a specific car belonging to the tenant.

delete.description: Deletes a car by its ID.

patch.description: Updates specific properties of an existing car.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all system users/administrators for the current tenant.
Retrieves profile details of a specific system user.

delete.description: Deletes a system user by their ID.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of logged daily revenues.
Generates a comprehensive revenue report for a specified date range, optionally filtered by driver and grouped by date or driver.

400.description: Invalid date range or request parameters

get.description: Fetches aggregate analytics (totals, trends) for the dashboard for a given year and optional month.
Retrieves a simplified list of drivers optimized for selection controls.
Uses the HttpOnly refreshToken cookie to issue a new HttpOnly accessToken cookie.

401.description: Unauthorized - Refresh token is missing, expired, or invalid

get.description: Retrieves information about the currently logged-in user.

200.description: User is logged in and session is valid

401.description: Unauthorized - No valid session cookie found

delete.description: Deactivates a specific remuneration configuration for a driver.

CreateDriverRequestDTO.description: Request object for creating a new driver

remunerationConfigs.description: The internal remuneration models assigned to the driver

DriverResponseDTO.description: Response object representing a driver in the system

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the driver was created

UpdateDriverRequestDTO.description: Request object for updating a driver

DriverInfoDTO.description: Driver information in a report entry

RevenueReportResponseDTO.description: Response object representing a detailed revenues report in the system

cookieAuth.description: JWT access token stored in httpOnly cookie 'accessToken'
cookieAuth.name: accessToken
